name: complex_mapping
creator: neiluj
description:
complex plane deformation, complex inequalities and parametric curves :

  • complex plane deformation : function of z returning another complex number, mode = 0 in main (main(1,12,0))

  • inequalities : Ex : Re(z)>=Im(z), abs(z)<=80… , mode = 1 in main, (main(1,12,1))

  • parametric curve : u(t) + v(t)*i where t = Re(z) or t=Im(z) , you choose u and v, Ex : cos(Re(z)) + isin(Re(z)), mode =0 in main

  • (+) / (-) : zoom
  • up/down : increase zoom step
  • (ok) : init zoom step to default
  • left : add more complex numbers (better precision)
  • right : remove some complex numbers (less precision)
